market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Microsoft’s AI data center push is colliding with its clean power goals
articles.description: The push for new data centers at Microsoft is putting one of the its key clean power goals at risk.

articles.title: Robinhood’s venture fund IPO attracted 150,000+ retail investors, CEO says
articles.description: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev says more than 150,000 retail investors joined the fintech’s new venture fund, which offers exposure to private tech companies like OpenAI, Stripe, Databricks, and Oura before they go public.

articles.title: Bitcoin market dominance moves above 61%: Will altcoins follow?
articles.description: Bitcoin's market dominance climbed above 61% as BTC led crypto market flows. Data also showed Binance-listed altcoins' share of volume hitting 49% in March.

articles.title: Hut 8 investors shrug off Q1 loss, stoke 33% stock surge
articles.description: The company also announced a new AI energy leasing deal as it continues to diversify into adjacent high-performance computing applications.

articles.title: Crypto-backed Republican candidate wins Indiana congressional primary
articles.description: Representative James Baird won the Republican primary for Indiana's 4th district on Tuesday after receiving an endorsement from Donald Trump and supportive spending from a crypto-backed PAC.

articles.title: How Elon Musk left OpenAI, according to Greg Brockman
articles.description: Cutthroat negotiations between startup founders are rarely shared so publicly, especially when a company becomes as world-changing as OpenAI.

articles.title: Anthropic signs Elon Musk's SpaceX for Colossus 1 compute ahead of June IPO
articles.description: The Claude maker said Wednesday it would use all the compute capacity at SpaceX's Colossus 1 data center, the latest partnership stitched onto its AI infrastructure buildout.

articles.title: DOJ says ransomware gang tapped into Russian government databases
articles.description: U.S. prosecutors said a ransomware gang fueled Russian government corruption, and allowed the gang's leaders to avoid paying taxes and dodge the country's military draft.

articles.title: Eric Trump takes shot at JPMorgan rethinking bitcoin after 'crapping' on asset
articles.description: The U.S. president's son, who co-founded American Bitcoin, said there's been a turnaround from traditional institutional firms now embracing bitcoin.

articles.title: AI evaluation startup Braintrust confirms breach, tells every customer to rotate sensitive keys
articles.description: Braintrust, a startup that makes an “operating system for engineers building AI software,” notified customers that hackers broke into one of its Amazon cloud environments, and is asking customers to rotate their API keys.

articles.title: Price predictions 5/6: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, ZEC
articles.description: Bitcoin sellers may show up if BTC hits $84,000, but altcoin charts continue to predict new price highs.

articles.title: Switzerland's Amina becomes first regulated bank to custody Canton Coin
articles.description: The FINMA-regulated bank's institutional clients will get access to trading and holding Canton Coin through a banking platform instead of crypto-native venues.

articles.title: The time is now: the Senate must act on crypto market structure legislation
articles.description: The United States needs to finally establish a clear framework that the market needs.

articles.title: SpaceX may spend up to $119B on ‘Terafab’ chip factory in Texas
articles.description: The project would be a "multi-phase, next-generation, vertically integrated semiconductor manufacturing and advanced computing fabrication facility," according to the proposal.

articles.title: DeepSeek could hit $45B valuation from its first investment round
articles.description: The Chinese AI lab came to prominence in early 2025 after launching a large language model that trained on a fraction of the compute power and at a fraction of the cost of the big U.S. models like those from OpenAI and Anthropic.

articles.title: Bermuda pushes stablecoin payments with USDC airdrop as it courts crypto firms, regulators
articles.description: Premier David Burt said Bermuda's "onchain economy" plan aims to bring stablecoins into everyday commerce.

articles.title: Crypto bill won't move without a ban on officials' industry ties, says U.S. Senator Gillibrand
articles.description: The Democratic lawmaker has been a negotiator for the Clarity Act, and one of the final sticking points is the crypto constraint on officials, including the president.

articles.title: The end of ads: Coinbase engineer says AI agents could kill the internet’s favorite business model
articles.description: Erik Reppel, who created the x402 protocol, said that the web economy depends heavily on advertising revenue generated from humans. AI agents bypass that system entirely.

articles.title: Ether tests $2.4K as accumulators add 246K ETH: How high can price go?
articles.description: Ether could rise as high as $3,500 in the coming days, fueled by rising balances in Ethereum accumulation wallets and a strengthening technical structure.

articles.title: Kevin O’Leary says Wall Street’s tokenization boom is all talk without crypto rules
articles.description: O’Leary says institutional investors still see tokenization as too risky without clear U.S. crypto regulation and compliance standards.
